pr.title: Record: ParallelResiduals + MiniDepthRecurrence, 1.1063 BPB / 1.8679 nats, -0.0072 vs PR #1179, -0.0143 vs merged SOTA

output.summary: Combines parallel residual lanes from layer 7 with delayed mini depth recurrence and AR-GPTQ mixed quantization to recover depth within the 10-minute budget.
techniques: Parallel residual routing keeps attention/MLP on separate lanes with learned writeback strengths.
Mini depth recurrence repeats layers 4-5 mid-training with untied MLPs for depth without constant slowdown.
Auto-regressive self-generated GPTQ mixed quantization keeps the 10-minute pipeline manageable.
